lenses.guidance: vv 49-51's Joshua-inheritance-last reverses the expected order — the leader takes his portion after the tribes, not before. The narrative structure makes servant-leadership the chapter's quiet ethic; allotment ends where it might have begun.

vv 49-50's Timnath-serah given to Joshua names the conquest's final inheritance — same place where he is buried at jos24:30. The redemption arc completes Joshua's life-arc on the very hill the covenant gave him.
